languages.text: "Он был великим, ваш предок. Песни сохранили сказания о походах с ним. А потом нас всех занесло сюда. Вольный Торговец сгинул в корнях, а нас оставили с Последним Приказом держать оборону этого мира. Мы и держали".

traits.locale_text: "Он был великим, ваш предок. Песни сохранили сказания о походах с ним. А потом нас всех занесло сюда. Вольный Торговец сгинул в корнях, а нас оставили с Последним Приказом держать оборону этого мира. Мы и держали. Держали и ждали, когда за нами вернутся".

languages.text: "Your ancestor was a great man. Our songs still carry the tales of our campaigns at his side. Then we were stranded here. The Rogue Trader vanished into the roots, leaving us with the Final Order: hold this world. And hold it we did."
languages.original_text: "Он был великим, ваш предок. Песни сохранили сказания о походах с ним. А потом нас всех занесло сюда. Вольный Торговец сгинул в корнях, а нас оставили с Последним Приказом держать оборону этого мира. Мы и держали".

traits.locale_text: "Your ancestor was a great man. Our songs still carry the tales of our campaigns at his side. Then, we were stranded here. The Rogue Trader vanished into the roots, leaving us with the Final Order: hold this world. And hold it we did."

"Your ancestor was a great man. Our songs still carry the tales of our campaigns at his side. Then we were stranded here. The Rogue Trader vanished into the roots, leaving us with the Final Order: hold this world. And hold it we did."

languages.text: "Euer Ahnherr war ein großer Mann. Unsere Lieder besingen bis heute unsere Feldzüge an seiner Seite. Dann strandeten wir hier. Der Freihändler verschwand in den Wurzeln und hinterließ uns einen letzten Befehl: Haltet diese Welt. Und das haben wir getan."
languages.original_text: "Your ancestor was a great man. Our songs still carry the tales of our campaigns at his side. Then we were stranded here. The Rogue Trader vanished into the roots, leaving us with the Final Order: hold this world. And hold it we did."

traits.locale_text: "Euer Ahnherr war ein großer Mann. Unsere Lieder besingen bis heute unsere Feldzüge an seiner Seite. Dann strandeten wir hier. Der Freihändler verschwand in den Wurzeln und hinterließ uns einen letzten Befehl: Haltet diese Welt. Und das haben wir getan."

languages.text: « Votre ancêtre était un grand homme. Nos chants évoquent encore nos campagnes à ses côtés, jusqu'au jour où nous avons échoué sur cette planète. Le libre-marchand a disparu dans les racines, en nous laissant l'Ordre ultime : tenir nos positions en ce monde. Et c'est ce que nous avons fait. »
languages.original_text: "Your ancestor was a great man. Our songs still carry the tales of our campaigns at his side. Then we were stranded here. The Rogue Trader vanished into the roots, leaving us with the Final Order: hold this world. And hold it we did."

traits.locale_text: « Votre ancêtre était un grand homme. Nos chants évoquent encore nos campagnes à ses côtés, jusqu'au jour où nous avons échoué sur cette planète. Le libre-marchand a disparu dans les racines, en nous laissant l'Ordre ultime : tenir nos positions en ce monde. Et c'est ce que nous avons fait. »

languages.text: «Su antepasado era un gran hombre. Nuestras canciones aún describen las campañas que libramos a su lado. Pero luego nos vimos atrapados aquí, y el Comerciante Independiente desapareció al otro lado de las raíces, dejándonos con la orden final: conservar este mundo. Y vaya si lo conservamos».
languages.original_text: "Your ancestor was a great man. Our songs still carry the tales of our campaigns at his side. Then we were stranded here. The Rogue Trader vanished into the roots, leaving us with the Final Order: hold this world. And hold it we did."

traits.locale_text: «Su antepasado era un gran hombre. Nuestras canciones aún describen las campañas que libramos a su lado. Pero luego nos vimos atrapados aquí, y el Comerciante Independiente desapareció al otro lado de las raíces, dejándonos con la orden final: conservar este mundo. Y vaya si lo conservamos».

languages.text: "Atanız harika bir adamdı. Şarkılarımız hâlâ onunla çıktığımız seferleri anlatır. Sonrasında burada mahsur kaldık. Hür Tacir, köklerin arasında kayboldu ve bize Son Emir'i bıraktı: Bu dünyayı tutun. Biz de dediğini yaptık."
languages.original_text: "Your ancestor was a great man. Our songs still carry the tales of our campaigns at his side. Then we were stranded here. The Rogue Trader vanished into the roots, leaving us with the Final Order: hold this world. And hold it we did."

traits.locale_text: "Atanız harika bir adamdı. Şarkılarımız hâlâ onunla çıktığımız seferleri anlatır. Sonrasında burada mahsur kaldık. Hür Tacir, köklerin arasında kayboldu ve bize Son Emir'i bıraktı: Bu dünyayı tutun. Biz de dediğini yaptık."

languages.text: “您的先祖是个伟人。我们的歌谣至今还传唱着当年在他身边征战的那些日子。后来我们被困在了这里。那位行商浪人消失在根系中，给我们留下了‘最后的命令’：守住这个世界。而我们，确实守住了。”
languages.original_text: "Your ancestor was a great man. Our songs still carry the tales of our campaigns at his side. Then we were stranded here. The Rogue Trader vanished into the roots, leaving us with the Final Order: hold this world. And hold it we did."

traits.locale_text: “您的先祖是个伟人。我们的歌谣至今还传唱着当年在他身边征战的那些日子。后来我们被困在了这里。那位行商浪人消失在根系中，给我们留下了‘最后的命令’：守住这个世界。而我们，确实守住了。”

languages.text: 「あなたの祖先は偉大な男でした。私たちの歌は、彼と共に戦った物語を今も伝えています。そして私たちはここに取り残されてしまいました。ローグ・トレーダーは根に消え、私たちに残されたのは最後の命令：この世界を守れ。そして私たちは守りました。」
languages.original_text: "Your ancestor was a great man. Our songs still carry the tales of our campaigns at his side. Then we were stranded here. The Rogue Trader vanished into the roots, leaving us with the Final Order: hold this world. And hold it we did."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの祖先は偉大な男でした。私たちの歌は、彼と共に戦った物語を今も伝えています。そして私たちはここに取り残されてしまいました。ローグ・トレーダーは根に消え、私たちに残されたのは最後の命令：この世界を守れ。そして私たちは守りました。」
